violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-Freezers were not cleaned as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Ceilings in kitchen area were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items *. Walk-in-Cooler light needs shielded.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Bags of popcorn kernels were on the ground in the dry storage area.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. The walk-in cooler was not working properly and was not maintaining proper temperature.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of the ice machine needs cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use shot glasses and lids were on the ground in the dry storage area.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Drain underneath the 3 compartment sink was backed-up and not draining properly at the time of inspection.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Carboard covering a vent in the kitchen is not cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in the kitchen/ prep area are not smooth and easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Tiles in the kitchen next to the 3 compartment sink are broken/missing.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop laying next to the mop sink, not in a proper place to dry.
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
